case_title: KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. VS. ANDREW GARDNER

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARDNER, ANDREW $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $149.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,649.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GARDNER, ANDREW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-04-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 99.50 - SERVED DEC-16-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GARDNER, ANDREW

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-04-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-04-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOHN LEGASPI--COMMUNITY RELATIONS--PUBLIC INFO. OFFICER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
